ListItem.Para: Only one head-up display (HUD) will function. The HUD SNGL OPERATION advisory message will be displayed.
Failure of a display unit may restore dual HUD capability.
When single HUD combiner is moved to the down position, momentary blanking may occur on some or all head down displays.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with DISPLAY UNIT INTERFACE faults provided:

ListItem.Para: Right PFD/MFD selector is verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the right PFD/MFD selector operates normally (AMM DDG 31-61-02).

ListItem.Para: Confirm that all positions of the right PFD/MFD selector operate normally.
Confirm that the NORM position operates normally:
Set right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD and the inboard display unit displays the MFD/EICAS or MFD/MFD format.
Confirm that the INBD position operates normally:
Set right PFD/MFD selector to INBD.
Confirm the right inboard display unit displays the PFD/EICAS or PFD/MFD format and the outboard display unit blanks.
Confirm that the OUTBD position operates normally:
Set right PFD/MFD selector to OUTBD.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD/EICAS or PFD/MFD format and the inboard display unit blanks.
Return right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.

OperationNote.Para: Display system has lost redundancy but will operate normally.
